'''âzh-j-j-l''' ('''kazhajeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuk|wuk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuk|wuk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-j-j-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazhajeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhajeloko|thizhajeloko]] || [[word:jizhajeloko|jizhajeloko]] || [[word:shizhajeloko|shizhajeloko]] || [[word:kizhajeloko|kizhajeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhajeloko|thozhajeloko]] || [[word:jozhajeloko|jozhajeloko]] || [[word:shozhajeloko|shozhajeloko]] || [[word:kozhajeloko|kozhajeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhajeloko|thĂŠzhajeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhajeloko|jĂŠzhajeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhajeloko|shĂŠzhajeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhajeloko|kĂŠzhajeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
